title: Better Spears
description: A datapack for improving the newly added Spears. It currently adds 6 NEW Enchantments/Abilities to the Spears. More coming soon..
body:
REWORKED

**Better Spears** currently adds **6 NEW Spear Enchantments** (more soon..) to 1.21.11. They can be **found as loot in structures**. The Spear Enchantments feature a **custom ability system**, specificly made for **combat & movement**. ________________________________________________________________________________________________ ## Features Overview
Enchantment/Ability List (Effects via ItemDisplays/Custom Models, Particles & Sounds.)

- **1. Heavens Condemnation** ⚡ - **Trigger:** Left-Click attack a Enemy. - **Effect:** Applies strong vertical knockback and **pins the target in mid-air**. While pinned, a **pentagram** is summoned below their feet and they get blasted with **rapid fire lightning** attacks. - **DMG:** 30 Strikes - **Duration:** ~5-6 Sec. - **Cooldown:** 60 Sec.

- **2. Chain Lightning** 🔗 - **Trigger:** Consecutive hits on enemys with Left-Click. - **Effect:** The first hit applies a **"Mark"** to the enemy. Subsequent hits trigger a **Discharge**, dealing **electrical damage** to all entities within a 10 block radius of the primary target. Mark can jump over to more enemys in a **additional +2 Block range**. Enemys that stay alive, **stay marked** for **Combo-Hits**. - **DMG:** 6 Hearts (12 DMG) - **Duration:** Mark stays 5 sec. - **Cooldown:** 10 Sec. (Combos bypass Cooldown.)

- **3. Depths Charge** 🌊 - **Trigger:** Left-Click (similar to Lunge/Riptide). - **Effect:** Launches the player into the air (Water/Rain needed) with **high velocity**. Generates a cloud particle explosion at the launch point. While holding the Spear the player **can't drown** and is **faster in water**. Works with **Elytra**. - **DMG:** - . - **Duration:** - . - **Cooldown:** - .

- **4. Soul Harvest** 🩸 - **Trigger:** Landing a Critical Hit with the Spear. - **Effect:** Spawns a red **pentagram zone** on the ground beneath the player. - **Buffs:** While standing inside the zone, the player gains **Strength**, **Attack Speed**, and **Lifesteal**. - **DMG:** - . - **Duration:** 15 Sec. - **Cooldown:** 45 Sec.

- **5. Spectral Trinity** 🔱 - **Trigger:** Right-click and release. Aim. Left-Click shoot/fire. - **Effect:** Spawns **3 Ghost Spears, floating above your head** and aiming in the direction you are looking at. Can be **shot** towards targets. - **DMG:** 6 Hearts (12 DMG) /each spear. - **Duration:** - . - **Cooldown:** 60 Sec.

- **6. Ice Prison** 🧊 - **Trigger:** Left-Click attack a Enemy. - **Effect:** It **traps a Target inside of a ice block**, "Ice Prison". In there the Target will recieve **Freeze DMG for every second** trapped. The Attacker has a **6 sec.** timeframe to hit **more targets** and **freeze as many as possible**. During this time, the attacker recieves a **+50% Attack Speed Buff**. - **DMG:** 1 Freeze DMG/sec. - **Duration:** 10 Sec. - **Cooldown:** 30 Sec.
(Enchantments can't be combined.)
How to get the Enchantments?
**All Custom Enchantments >CAN BE FOUND AS BOOKS< inside of Structures**: - Heavens Condemnation: Buried Treasure = (25%) - Chain Lightning: Trial Chambers = (Corridor(1%) / Vault(18%) - Depths Charge: Ocean Ruins = (18%) - Soul Harvest: Nether Fortress / Bastion = (18%) - Spectral Trinity: End City = (18%) - Ice Prison: Snowy Village = (8%) / Igloo = (100%)
**Or by using commands**: - /function betterspears:give/heavens_condemnation_book - /function betterspears:give/chain_lightning_book - /function betterspears:give/depths_charge_book - /function betterspears:give/soul_harvest_book - /function betterspears:give/spectral_trinity_book - /function betterspears:give/ice_prison_book
________________________________________________________________________________________________ ### Compatibility ⚙️ **Works on Servers!✅**

Better Spears is developed for Minecraft **1.21.11**. **Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/rXnr7XHRg8) server for Bug reports or feature suggestions :)**
